race.comment: Open. Olive-trained STAR BLING (6) found the grade a bit tough at Canberra two back but bounced straight back, beaten a whisker over this trip at the Sapphire Coast. Settled last from the awkward barrier, and there was plenty of merit in her effort. Keeps improving, and with average luck in the run can go one better  UNDER THE HAT (7) built on a nose defeat this track/trip on the heavy with a win in a CL2 at Cowra on dry ground.  Didn't have it easy before leading them up. Has to lug more weight in easier, but it's hard to knock the form. BELNERA (8) brings strong form from Wagga. Won over this trip and then came back to 1400m this grade and missed the hat-trick by just 1.4L. Should enjoy a soft run from the inside gate and also has claims. TAYTAY BAY (2) has been racing in Canberra in stronger class and two back was beaten less than 2L over this distance. Has a handy 2kg claim and will present at peak fitness. Keep onside.
